title: Crosley Furniture CF7006-WH Vista Vanity - White

variation_files.prompt: The vanity is positioned in a well-lit room with soft, natural light streaming through a large window with black frames, revealing green foliage outside. The walls are painted a calm, light blue, and a framed abstract artwork hangs on the wall to the left of the vanity. The vanity sits on a dark, polished floor partially covered by a textured, neutral-toned area rug. A matching white vanity stool with a cushioned seat is placed in front of the vanity. The surface of the vanity holds decorative items including a glass lantern, a tray with toiletries, and a few books. The overall scene is bright, airy, and styled for a lifestyle or home decor setting.

title: Kiuree Farmhouse Decorative Throw Pillow Covers 18x18 inch Cute Faux Stripe Leather Accent Pillow for Couch Boho Modern Decor Pillow (Coffee)

variation_files.prompt: A rectangular throw pillow cover is placed horizontally on a white, slightly distressed wooden mantel or shelf. The background consists of a soft, textured off-white fabric curtain or wall covering, creating a neutral and airy backdrop. A square throw pillow cover is placed diagonally on a light gray upholstered armchair with rolled arms and button tufting. The chair is draped with a thick, cream-colored knitted blanket that cascades over the seat and armrests. The background features a bright, minimalist interior with a light wooden floor, a white wall, and a wooden cabinet with a glass door to the left. The cabinet has a simple, rustic design with visible wood grain and a small decorative etched design on the glass. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a warm, cozy atmosphere. The composition is centered on the throw pillow cover, with the chair and surrounding elements framing it naturally.
